name: owner
description: Primary company owner. Full access to company data, billing, users, and settings.

name: admin
description: Company administrator. Can manage projects, invoices, and team members but not subscription ownership.

name: manager
description: Project or department manager. Can manage assigned projects, tasks, and reports.

name: accountant
description: Access to invoices, payments, financial reports, and billing data.

name: employee
description: Standard employee. Access to assigned tasks, projects, and internal documents.

name: support
description: Can create and manage support tickets and client communications.

name: guest
description: Read-only access to company data such as reports and project status.
